description: Find My Expert — SAP Austria Internal Expert Directory

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Viewer
scopes.description: Read-only access to expert directory and search

scopes.name: $XSAPPNAME.Admin
scopes.description: Full admin access: manage experts, topics, solutions

role-collections.name: FindMyExpert_Viewer
role-collections.description: Viewer-Zugang für Find My Expert (Suche & Verzeichnis)

role-collections.name: FindMyExpert_Admin
role-collections.description: Admin-Zugang für Find My Expert (Verwaltung aller Daten)
